steps: Go to https://app.asana.com and sign in to your account
Click your profile photo in the top right corner
Select 'My Settings' from the dropdown menu
Click 'Manage Developer Apps' or navigate directly to https://app.asana.com/0/my-apps
Enter a descriptive name for the token (e.g. 'My Integration Token')
Accept the Asana API Terms of Service
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again
notes: Free Asana account is sufficient to generate Personal Access Tokens
The token is shown only once — copy and store it securely immediately
PATs act on behalf of your user account — they have the same permissions as your Asana user
For production apps with multiple users, use OAuth2 instead of PATs
Rate limit: 1,500 requests per minute per user token
All API requests must include the workspace or organization GID

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Asana profile
